response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine staff-level breadth, real high-throughput distributed systems experience from Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests per second), and current hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly maps to the AI-native engineering environment described. However, Python — listed as a must-have strong skill — is entirely absent from the resume and skills list, which is a hard gap for this role. The high-throughput distributed work is also dated (2018–2020), with recent roles skewing toward product-oriented full-stack TypeScript work. The combination of relevant AI exposure and staff-level track record justifies a screening call, but the Python gap needs to be resolved before moving further.
strengths: Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — directly relevant to the AI-native engineering baseline the role requires
Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency DLang services
Consistent staff-level seniority across multiple employers with demonstrated breadth across web, infrastructure, tooling, and embedded domains
concerns: Python is a stated must-have strong skill but is completely absent from the resume, skills section, and all project descriptions
Distributed systems and high-throughput architecture work is concentrated in 2018–2020; recent roles (2021–present) are primarily product-focused full-stack TypeScript
No explicit evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management, technical strategy ownership at scale, or incident-response and on-call operational experience
